Class LoggingDecorator

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.smartfactory.patterns.observer.FactoryEntity
cz.cvut.fel.omo.smartfactory.patterns.decorator.FactoryEntityDecorator
cz.cvut.fel.omo.smartfactory.patterns.decorator.LoggingDecorator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Subject
public class LoggingDecorator extends FactoryEntityDecorator
Decorator that adds logging functionality to FactoryEntity.
